title: Ameren names Chief Sustainability and Diversity Officer to further optimize ESG impact
text: ST. LOUIS, Feb. 28, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Underscoring its commitment to sustainability, which incorporates environmental, social, governance (ESG) and growth goals, Ameren Corporation (NYSE: AEE) has expanded the role of a senior leader at the company to also include diversity, equity, inclusion and corporate philanthropy. Effective March 1, Gwen Mizell has been named chief sustainability and diversity officer for Ameren Corporation, further aligning her leadership, expertise and engagement to oversee and advance the company's impacts across these interconnected areas.

title: Ameren's (AEE) Q4 Earnings Lag Estimates, Revenues Beat
text: Ameren's (AEE) Q4 earnings of 48 cents per share miss the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 4% but increase 4.3% from 46 cents reported in the year-ago quarter.

title: Ameren Corp (AEE) CEO Martin Lyons on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Ameren Corp (AEE) CEO Martin Lyons on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript

title: Ameren Missouri customers getting stronger, smarter, cleaner and more resilient energy grid, thanks to Smart Energy Plan
text: ST. LOUIS, Feb. 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Ameren Missouri, a subsidiary of Ameren Corporation (NYSE: AEE), filed its updated Smart Energy Plan with the Missouri Public Service Commission today, describing the company's plan to invest $8.4 billion primarily on grid modernization efforts over the next five years. Projects include investments in upgrading aging infrastructure, automated technology, stronger poles and upgraded power lines that benefit customers by reducing outages, restoring power faster.

title: Ameren Announces 2021 Results and Issues Guidance for 2022 Earnings and Long-Term Growth
text: ST. LOUIS, Feb. 17, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Ameren Corporation (NYSE: AEE) today announced 2021 net income attributable to common shareholders of $990 million, or $3.84 per diluted share, compared to 2020 net income attributable to common shareholders of $871 million, or $3.50 per diluted share. Earnings results for 2021 were driven by strong operating performance and execution of the company's strategy.

title: Ameren enters agreement to acquire large solar facility
text: ST. LOUIS, Feb. 16, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Today Ameren Missouri, a subsidiary of Ameren Corporation (NYSE: AEE), announced an agreement with Invenergy, a leading developer, owner and operator of sustainable energy solutions, to acquire a 150-megawatt solar facility project being developed in southeastern Illinois. The deal is subject to closing conditions, including regulatory approvals.

title: Ameren Corporation increases quarterly cash dividend by 7.3 percent, marking ninth consecutive year of growth
text: ST. LOUIS, Feb. 11, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The board of directors of Ameren Corporation (NYSE: AEE) today declared a quarterly cash dividend on its common stock of 59 cents per share, a 7.3% increase from the prior quarterly cash dividend of 55 cents per share, resulting in an annualized equivalent dividend rate of $2.36 per share. The previous annualized equivalent dividend rate was $2.20 per share.

title: 4 Utility Stocks Set to Surpass Q4 Earnings Estimates
text: Utilities DTE, D, ES, and AEE are likely to beat four-quarter earnings estimates, courtesy of stable demand for their services and systematic investments to provide quality services to customers.

title: Ameren Illinois receives approval to construct Logan County Connector Project
text: LINCOLN, Ill., Feb. 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Ameren Illinois, a wholly owned subsidiary of Ameren Corporation (NYSE: AEE), received approval from the Illinois Commerce Commission (ICC) to proceed with the construction of the Logan County Connector Project.
